flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Frostburg State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.8k vs 3.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Frostburg State University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3k → 2.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Frostburg State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Frostburg State University rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (25.1% → 32.5%).
